## Testing

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run security:check`
- [ ] Manual UI check, if frontend behavior changed

## Checklist

- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated both English and Japanese UI strings/docs when user-facing text changed.
- [ ] I did not include real router credentials, tokens, MAC addresses, hostnames, or private network logs.
- [ ] I updated README, SECURITY, or setup docs if behavior or deployment guidance changed.
